creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you please send me more detailed information? Something like:

- Complete install log (make install >& output_file)
- pkg_info

Thanks
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <garga @ freebsdbrasil.com.br>
GnuPG Key: http://www.FreeBSD.org/~garga/pubkey.asc

Lucky, adj:
	When you have a wife and a cigarette
	lighter -- both of which work.
